title: Over-engineering costs $12k/year — here’s the fix
meta_description: Cut monthly AWS bill 98% with a single-process architecture — latency dropped 86%, support tickets vanished. Real numbers from a 2025 production rebuild.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn $12k/year on over-engineered systems before realizing simplicity wins.

We cut our AWS bill 98% by removing Kafka, EKS, and Circuit Breakers.

https://kubaik.github.io/over-engineering-costs-12kyear-heres-the-fix
